scope: contract freeze only; not a commit gate implementation; no parameter update
task21_allowed_behavior: generate gate_decision as no-write output only
emit one decision per candidate: blocked, watch_only, or eligible_for_future_review

candidate_contract.default_decision_reason: gate_ready_overall is false; evidence remains insufficient or boundaries remain unconfirmed for any write or adoption.

allowed_task21_decisions.watch_only: continued observation is allowed, but gate adoption is forbidden
allowed_task21_decisions.eligible_for_future_review: future review candidate only; execution remains forbidden
